diagrams.title: Pollution Types Classification
diagrams.description: Classification of environmental pollution into major categories with examples
elements: Air Pollution - smoke, gases, particulate matter
Water Pollution - industrial waste, sewage, agricultural runoff
Soil Pollution - heavy metals, pesticides, solid waste
Thermal Pollution - heated water from power plants
diagrams.purpose: Understand different categories of pollution and their sources

diagrams.title: Biomagnification Process
diagrams.description: Diagram showing accumulation of toxins through food chain
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how toxins magnify at each level of food chain

diagrams.title: Acid Rain Formation
diagrams.description: Process of acid rain formation from industrial emissions
elements: Factory/_power plant emitting SO2 and NOx
Reaction with water vapor in atmosphere
Formation of sulfuric and nitric acids
Acid rain falling on buildings, trees, lakes
diagrams.purpose: Understand the chemistry and impact of acid rain

diagrams.title: Eutrophication Process
diagrams.description: Shows how excess nutrients cause oxygen depletion in water bodies
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the sequence of events leading to eutrophication
